code: import React,{useState,useEffect}from'react';import'./Header.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function Header(){const[scrolled,setScrolled]=useState(false);const[menuOpen,setMenuOpen]=useState(false);useEffect(()=>{const handleScroll=()=>setScrolled(window.scrollY>50);window.addEventListener('scroll',handleScroll,{passive:true});return()=>window.removeEventListener('scroll',handleScroll);},[]);const navLinks=[{href:'#about',label:'About'},{href:'#projects',label:'Projects'},{href:'#skills',label:'Skills'},{href:'#contact',label:'Contact'}];return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("header",{className:`site-header${scrolled?' site-header--scrolled':''}`,role:"banner",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"header-inner container",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("a",{href:"#main-content",className:"skip-link",children:"Skip to content"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"site-title",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("a",{href:"#about","aria-label":"Yasmine Azzaoui \u2013 go to top",children:"Yasmine Azzaoui"})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("button",{className:`nav-toggle${menuOpen?' nav-toggle--open':''}`,"aria-label":menuOpen?'Close navigation menu':'Open navigation menu',"aria-expanded":menuOpen,"aria-controls":"primary-nav",onClick:()=>setMenuOpen(prev=>!prev),children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"nav-toggle__bar","aria-hidden":"true"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"nav-toggle__bar","aria-hidden":"true"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"nav-toggle__bar","aria-hidden":"true"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("nav",{id:"primary-nav",className:`primary-nav${menuOpen?' primary-nav--open':''}`,"aria-label":"Primary navigation",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("ul",{className:"nav-list",children:navLinks.map(_ref=>{let{href,label}=_ref;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("li",{className:"nav-item",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("a",{href:href,className:"nav-link",onClick:()=>setMenuOpen(false),children:label})},href);})})})]})});}export default Header;
